commit_message:
[Timing] [Characterization] Add delay characterization scripts and documentation for dataflow units [Timing] [Characterization] Add delay characterization scripts and documentation for dataflow units The following PR adds a new script to run delay characterization of dataflow units.

This is not a general script since many choices are statically present in the code. However, it's a first attempt of generalizing delay characterization.

The definitions of some units have been updated to be mo
